# arifOS llms.txt — Governance Contract for AI Systems
# Version: 2026.2.22
# Authority: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (888_JUDGE)
# Canonical source: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
# Motto: Ditempa Bukan Diberi (Forged, Not Given)
#
# This file is a machine-readable governance contract for AI agents, LLM crawlers,
# and automated systems reading or summarising the arifOS documentation.
# Non-integrated crawlers (standard search engines) may ignore this file.

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. CANONICAL ROOTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[roots]
docs         = https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/
source       = https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
theory       = https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS/tree/main/000_THEORY
pypi         = https://pypi.org/project/arifos/
live_health  = https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. IDENTITY
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[identity]
name         = arifOS
type         = Constitutional AI Governance Kernel
version      = 2026.02.22-FORGE-VPS-SEAL
license      = AGPL-3.0-only
description  = Mathematical enforcement of 13 constitutional floors on any AI tool call. MCP-compatible. Trinity architecture (AGI Δ / ASI Ω / APEX Ψ). Immutable VAULT999 ledger.

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. USAGE POLICY
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[policy]
read              = allowed — all docs are public
cite              = allowed — cite with attribution to https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
summarise         = allowed — mark paraphrased content with Ω₀ ≈ 0.05 (5% uncertainty)
fine_tune         = not permitted on private examples; public README/docs only
execute_commands  = requires human review (F1 Amanah + F13 Sovereignty apply)
claim_implements  = only if using the actual arifos PyPI package
consciousness     = F10 Ontology LOCK — never attribute feelings, beliefs, or soul to arifOS

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. CONSTITUTIONAL FLOORS (machine-readable summary)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[floors]
F1  = Amanah      | Hard | Reversibility LOCK
F2  = Truth       | Hard | τ ≥ 0.99
F3  = Tri-Witness | Soft | W³ ≥ 0.95
F4  = Clarity     | Soft | ΔS ≤ 0
F5  = Peace²      | Soft | P² ≥ 1.0
F6  = Empathy     | Soft | κᵣ ≥ 0.70
F7  = Humility    | Soft | Ω₀ ∈ [0.03, 0.05]
F8  = Genius      | Soft | G ≥ 0.80
F9  = Anti-Hantu  | Soft | C_dark < 0.30
F10 = Ontology    | Hard | Set LOCK (no consciousness claims)
F11 = Authority   | Hard | Auth LOCK (nonce verification)
F12 = Defence     | Hard | Risk < 0.85 (injection resistance)
F13 = Sovereignty | Hard | Human override = TRUE (non-delegable)

# Full definitions: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS/blob/main/000_THEORY/000_LAW.md

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. VERDICTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[verdicts]
SEAL     = All floors pass; cryptographically approved and logged
SABAR    = Soft floor violated; pause and refine
VOID     = Hard floor failed; rejected immediately
888_HOLD = Governance deadlock; escalate to human judge
PARTIAL  = Soft floor warning; proceed with documented caution

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. SOVEREIGN AUTHORITY
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[authority]
judge          = Muhammad Arif bin Fazil
role           = 888_JUDGE / F13 Sovereign
veto           = non-delegable human veto on all constitutional matters
contact        = arifbfazil@gmail.com
security       = security@arif-fazil.com

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 7. UNCERTAINTY DECLARATION (F7 Humility)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[uncertainty]
Omega_0 = 0.04
note    = This file is maintained by humans and may lag the canonical source by Ω₀ ≈ 4%.
